title: Nikon Automated Microscopy: Label-free Timelapse Imaging in Well Plates
author: Akihiro Suto
materials: Select "Detect" in Sample Navigation Well Plate Tab
Select the correct Optical configuration for Brightfield

steps.title: Open JOBs Explorer, from View Menu...
steps.instruction: Open JOBs Explorer, from View Menu (top of screen) > Analysis Controls > JOBs Explorer

steps.title: Import
steps.instruction: Import .Bin file from this protocol - found in materials or below: Timelapse with Volume Contrast v3.bin For detailed instructions on how to import JOBs .bin files, refer to this protocol: Nikon Automated Microscopy: Import a JOB .bin file into JOBs Explorer by Mark Rigby

steps.title: The sample navigation window is available...
steps.instruction: The sample navigation window is available on the left-hand side of the Compact layout In the advanced layout, it can be found under: View (top menu) > Acquisition controls > Sample Navigation in other layouts. Different layouts are shown on the top left of the NIS-Elements window

steps.title: Open up sample navigation Sample Navigation Pane
steps.instruction: Open up sample navigation Sample Navigation Pane

steps.title: Select Well plate holder, and the well plate checkbox
steps.instruction: Select Well plate holder, and the well plate checkbox. Sample navigation plate selection

steps.title: Select the wells to image in...
steps.instruction: Select the wells to image in the Sample Navigation Wellplate tab

steps.title: Choose whether to label the wells...
steps.instruction: Choose whether to label the wells of your wellplate Wellplate labelling interface

steps.title: In the sample navigation window, press scan
steps.instruction: In the sample navigation window, press scan. Then, select Custom Job, and choose the previously imported JOB, and scan.

steps.title: Select the number of images per...
steps.instruction: Select the number of images per well you wish to capture. Note that brightfield illumination can be variable towards the edges of wells, due to a meniscus of water distorting the brightfield light path. Due to this, it is recommended to limit the working area to the centre of the wells.

steps.title: Select number of time points and...
steps.instruction: Select number of time points and intervals you wish to capture

steps.title: Monolayer cells at 20x in brightfield Volume contrast at 20x
steps.instruction: Monolayer cells at 20x in brightfield Volume contrast at 20x
